global_summary: The company is behind pace, 16.5 points under plan with just 21 of 145 tasks done. No project logged a single completion since yesterday. Cashflow holds and slipping framing and foundation work are dragging multiple sites into next week.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only the fireplace-and-doors fix landed this week; painting, gutters, cleaning and final inspection remain open. Push PAINTING and FINAL INSPECTION by Fri Jul 10.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: 15.4% of planned work-days earned vs 92.3% expected — behind (1/11 tasks done). Week is saved only if GUTTERS: INSTALL GUTTERS by Sun Jul 12.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Walls and ceiling painted, but tiles slipped a week to Fri Jul 17. Buy interior doors today and install KITCHEN ELECTRICAL TRIM by Sun Jul 12.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug, but placing form board slipped out of this week to Mon Jul 13, pushing the pour chain five days. Place FORM BOARD by Mon Jul 13.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Zero progress this week — carpet, backsplash, fireplace mantel and shutters all bumped out, carpet by sixteen days. Install FIREPLACE MANTEL by Mon Jul 13.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Nothing closed this week — exterior sheathing, roof decking and doors/windows all slid to Mon Jul 13. Execute EXTERIOR SHEATHING and ROOF DECKING by Mon Jul 13.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: 51.0% of planned work-days earned vs 67.3% expected — behind (4/17 tasks done). Key slip: FINAL: PUNCH LIST COMPLETION (Thu Jul 23 → Mon Jul 27, +4d).

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Plumbing fix done; drywall hang slipped to Thu Jul 9 and still isn't up. Hang SHEETROCK — sub starts Sat Jul 11.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Electrical and plumbing rough-ins are in and stairs framed, but mechanical rough-in slipped to Wed Jul 15. Execute MECHANICAL ROUGH IN by Wed Jul 15.
